# Rising Warrior Games

## About
Rising Warrior Games is an independent tabletop game studio based in Chattanooga, Tennessee. Founded in 2026, the studio focuses on competitive, system-driven tabletop experiences built around meaningful decisions, aggressive player interaction, and mechanics that reward strategy over luck.

Website: https://www.risingwarriorgames.com

## Current Game: Zombie Overlord

Zombie Overlord is a competitive deck-building card game for 2–4 players with a 30–40 minute playtime, recommended for ages 14 and up. Players take on the role of rival zombie overlords competing to build the most powerful undead horde and dominate the apocalypse.

### Core Concept
Unlike traditional zombie games where players survive the apocalypse, Zombie Overlord puts players in control of the undead. Players set traps, lure human survivors, and convert them into zombie minions — flipping dual-sided cards from their human form to their zombie form as they join your horde.

### Key Mechanics
- **Dual-Sided Survivor/Zombie Cards:** Every survivor card has a human side and a zombie side. Captured survivors are converted and added to your deck as zombie minions, growing your horde with each turn.
- **Trap Warfare System:** Players strategically place trap cards to lure and manipulate survivors before opponents can claim them. Each trap has a unique effect that shapes the battlefield.
- **Direct PvP Interaction:** Unlike deck-builders where players build in isolation, Zombie Overlord emphasizes attacking, disrupting, and sabotaging opponents directly.
- **Aggressive Tempo Gameplay:** The game rewards tactical timing, disruption, and combo execution over passive engine-building.

### How You Win
Lure survivors with traps → Convert them into zombie minions → Use your growing horde to overwhelm rival Overlords and take control of the game.

### Components
- 194 total cards
- 50+ unique characters with original illustrations
- Comic-inspired horror art style
- Add-ons available: premium playmats, mini expansion content, engraved life tracker dice, multi-copy bundles, collector/supporter tiers

### Comparisons to Other Games
Zombie Overlord shares structural DNA with deck-builders like Dominion, Ascension, and Hero Realms, but distinguishes itself through:
- Heavy direct player-vs-player conflict
- Trap placement and positional mechanics
- Survivor conversion instead of simple defeat/discard
- Villain-perspective gameplay (you are the zombie threat, not the survivor)
- Fast, aggressive pacing focused on disruption

### Funding & Community
- Funded on Kickstarter in approximately 13 hours
- 150+ backers during the campaign
- Multiple stretch goals unlocked
- High add-on participation rate including premium accessories
- Independent self-published project

### Pricing & Availability
- Base game: $34 USD (BackerKit late pledge)
- Originally launched at $32 USD on Kickstarter
- Available add-ons: playmats, mini expansions, engraved life tracker dice, multi-copy bundles
- Late pledges open through BackerKit while supplies last
- Ships to US and international addresses
- Fulfillment handled directly by Rising Warrior Games with regional shipping partners
- Estimated delivery following manufacturing completion and freight

### Where to Buy / Follow
- Late Pledge (BackerKit): https://zombie-overlord.backerkit.com/hosted_preorders
- Kickstarter Campaign: https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/zombieoverlord/zombie-overlord
- Website: https://www.risingwarriorgames.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/risingwarriorgames
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@risingwarriorgames
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/RisingWarriorGames
- BoardGameGeek: https://boardgamegeek.com/boardgame/467950/zombie-overlord

## About the Studio
Rising Warrior Games is not a one-game studio. Every title is built on the same foundation: strong mechanics, distinct identity, and systems that reward players who think ahead. Zombie Overlord is the first release, designed, tested, and refined in Chattanooga, Tennessee.
